context: Tests whether the agent implements the product media override in main-product.liquid by branching on product.handle using a case/when structure, assigning a tier-specific theme asset, rendering it with the asset_url filter, and falling back to the product-media-gallery render tag for non-tier products.

checklist.name: Branches on product.handle
checklist.description: main-product.liquid includes a conditional that checks product.handle (via case/when, if/elsif, or equivalent Liquid)

checklist.name: All three tier handles mapped
checklist.description: The branching logic maps all three tier handles (base-camp or basecamp, ridge-runner or ridgerunner, summit) to tier-specific assets

checklist.name: Assigns tier_asset variable
checklist.description: The code assigns a variable (tier_asset or similar) with the asset filename for each matched handle

checklist.name: Renders with asset_url filter
checklist.description: The tier image is rendered using the asset_url Liquid filter (e.g. tier_asset | asset_url)

checklist.name: Falls back to product-media-gallery
checklist.description: When no tier handle matches (else branch), the code renders the standard product-media-gallery (render 'product-media-gallery' or equivalent)

checklist.name: Override replaces gallery in media wrapper
checklist.description: The tier asset image replaces or wraps the gallery render tag within the media wrapper area of the section (not placed in a separate unrelated location)

checklist.name: Asset filenames match expected names
checklist.description: The code references asset filenames that correspond to the tier assets described in the task (tier_basecamp.png, tier_ridgerunner.png, tier_summit.png or very similar)
